summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CompassAI governance engine implementation. All backend APIs working correctly (health, dashboard stats, controls, policies, use case CRUD, risk assessment, deliverable generation, audit export). Frontend fully functional with dashboard showing correct stats (12 controls, 3 policies), 3-step use case wizard working, risk assessment engine operational, deliverable generation successful, and audit export functionality confirmed.
passed_tests: CompassAI health endpoint (/api/compass/health) - operational status confirmed
Dashboard stats API (/api/compass/dashboard/stats) - shows 12 controls, 3 policies correctly
Controls API (/api/compass/controls) - returns 12 controls as expected
Policies API (/api/compass/policies) - returns 3 policies as expected
Use case creation API (/api/compass/usecases) - successful creation with proper ID generation
Use case listing API - shows created use cases
Use case detail API - retrieves specific use case by ID
Risk assessment API (/api/compass/risk/assess) - correctly assigned T3 tier for test case
Deliverable generation API (/api/compass/deliverables/generate) - generated 6 deliverables
Audit export API (/api/compass/audit/export) - successful bundle generation
Homepage displays ML monogram in nav and needle logo in hero section
CompassAI page loads correctly from /compass route
CompassAI dashboard shows correct statistics (2 total use cases, 1 pending approval, 12 controls, 3 policies)
Use Cases tab navigation working
New Use Case wizard opens with 3-step process
Use case wizard form validation and step progression working
Use case creation through wizard successful
Use case detail view accessible with tabs (Overview, Risk, Controls, Deliverables)
Risk assessment functionality operational
Deliverables tab shows generated deliverables (6 found)
Export audit functionality working with file download
Risk tier T0-T3 classification system working
No console errors or runtime exceptions found
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (18/18 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (23 UI/integration tests passed)
